input.background: We propose to draw boxplots for the air sample data presented in prior illustrations (see Table 4.2).
input.question: Compare the side-by-side boxplots for site 1 and site 2.

output.method: 离散型-连续型变量关系
output.answer: The side-by-side boxplots in this figure show site 1 and site 2 have similar central locations but different spreads.

site.description: The location where the air samples were collected.

air_sample_data.value: Values from Table 4.2 corresponding to air sample measurements for each site
air_sample_data.description: The air sample measurements collected at each site.
